title: The Miracle of Marcelino
writer: José María Sánchez Silva, Ladislao Vajda
actors: Rafael Rivelles, Antonio Vico, Juan Calvo
plot: Marcelino is an orphan who grows up in a monastery. One day when he eats his small meal in a room full of old things, he gives a piece of his bread to an old wooden Jesus figure--which actually takes the bread and eats it. Getting...
